title: Dialog Component Tests — Plan Review (Corrected)
correction_note: Initial review based on stale read of dialog-mocks.ts (104 lines). The actual file is 364 lines with comprehensive mock infrastructure already in place. This review reflects the current state.
summary: The plan's foundational mock infrastructure is substantially already in place — dialog-mocks.ts provides 13 context mocks via mockAllContexts(), all 6 missing UI sub-modules in mockUiPrimitives(), and realistic stub defaults for every @/context/* module the 22 dialogs need. The remaining preconditions are: (1) add third-party mocks for @tanstack/solid-query, @solidjs/router, @opencode-ai/core/util/{path,encode}, @kobalte/core/popover, and fuzzysort; (2) add @/utils/* mocks; (3) document Bun 1.3.14's per-process mock.module() limitation (run with --isolate or per-file); (4) reclassify DialogEditProject from File 2 to File 7; (5) run POC tests for one simple and one complex dialog before creating all 7 files.

coupling.note: Grouping by dependency profile reduces coupling between test files. The sibling dialog import cascades (6 static, 4 dynamic) are manageable because mockAllContexts() covers all transitive @/context/* deps. The circular dialog-custom-provider ↔ dialog-select-provider import works via ESM partial evaluation but requires @tanstack/solid-query mocked.

debuggability.note: Harness provides clear assertion helpers. clickButton errors list available buttons. Mock stubs return typed objects with realistic shapes.

convergence.note: Extends the proven DT-001 pattern (mountDialog + hyperscript). dialog-mocks.ts follows the existing module structure. No architectural deviation.

surface_area.note: Only adds new test files. No production dialog components modified. mockAllContexts() and mockUiPrimitives() are in test utilities.

testability.note: 13 @/context/* modules are mocked. 20 UI sub-modules are mocked. Remaining gaps: @tanstack/solid-query (4 dialogs), @solidjs/router (5 dialogs), @opencode-ai/core/util/* (4 dialogs), @kobalte/core/popover (1 dialog), fuzzysort (1 dialog), @/utils/* (5 dialogs), and non-dialog sibling components. Bun 1.3.14 mock.module() is per-process — requires --isolate flag or per-file execution.

error_clarity.note: Identity t(key) translation will show i18n keys in assertions. getMockDefaults() provides realistic stub shapes. clickButton has helpful button enumeration in error messages.

reversibility.note: All changes are additive (new test files). No production code changes. Clean revert per test file.

context_mocks.mock: usePlatform: () => ({ platform: 'web', fetch, openDirectoryPicker, openFilePicker, saveFilePicker })
useSDK: () => ({ client: null, directory, url, createClient })
usePrompt: () => ({ current, set, reset, context, messages })
useFile: () => ({ tree, children, expanded, expand, collapse })

convenience_functions.mockAllContexts(): calls all 13 context mock functions — full @/context/* coverage

convenience_functions.getMockDefaults(): returns shared MockProviders interface with realistic stub values

third_party_modules.recommendation: mock.module('@tanstack/solid-query', () => ({ useMutation: () => ({ mutate: async () => {}, mutateAsync: async () => {} }), useQueryClient: () => ({ invalidateQueries: () => {} }) }))

util_modules.recommendation: mock.module('@/utils/server-health', () => ({ useCheckServerHealth: () => ({ data: null, refetch: () => {} }), ServerHealth: {} }))

bun_version_concern.issue: mock.module() mutates a per-process registry. Mocks set in one test file leak into another when run in the same bun test invocation.
bun_version_concern.workaround: Use `bun test --isolate` flag or run each dialog test file individually (`bun test src/components/dialog-edit-mcp.test.ts`).
bun_version_concern.future_fix: PR #31319 (merged 2026-05-24) adds per-file mock sweep — not in 1.3.14.

objections.evidence: dialog-mocks.ts has mockAllContexts() but lacks mocks for @tanstack/solid-query, @solidjs/router, @opencode-ai/core/util/*, @kobalte/core/popover, fuzzysort, and @/utils/*
objections.finding: While the @/context/* mock infrastructure is complete (all 13 modules), 6 third-party modules, 5 @/utils/* modules, and 5+ non-dialog sibling components remain unmocked. These will block 8 of the 22 dialogs from importing.

objections.evidence: bun --version = 1.3.14. Confirmed per mock.module() issue across Bun issues #12823, #25712, #31316.
objections.finding: Bun 1.3.14's mock.module() is per-process, not per-file. Running `bun test src/components/dialog-*.test.ts` in a single invocation will leak mocks between test files. A test file that does not call mockAllContexts() may still have those mocks active from a previous file. Per-file mock sweep (PR #31319) was merged May 24, 2026 but is not in 1.3.14.
objections.workaround: Use `bun test --isolate` flag to force per-file environment isolation, or run each test file individually.

objections.evidence: Plan File 2 groups DialogEditProject with DialogReleaseNotes, DialogOnboarding, DialogUsageExceeded as 'simple props-based dialogs'.
objections.finding: DialogEditProject has 9+ imports including @tanstack/solid-query, @/context/server-sdk, @/context/server-sync, @/context/layout, @opencode-ai/core/util/path, and @/pages/layout/helpers. This is one of the most complex dialogs, not a simple one. It belongs in File 7 (dialog-complex.test.ts).

Identity translation will show i18n keys (e.g., 'dialog.release-notes.title') in test assertions instead of human-readable text. This makes test output harder to read and debug. Developers should be aware that to assert on translated text they must override the mock.

objections.evidence: dialog-settings imports 4 Settings* sub-components; dialog-select-file imports from @/pages/session/
objections.finding: Several dialogs import from outside the dialog component directory. dialog-settings imports SettingsGeneral, SettingsKeybinds, etc. dialog-select-file imports from @/pages/session/. These non-dialog siblings may have their own unmocked imports and add to the cascade.

conditions_for_approval.requirement: Add 6 third-party mocks to dialog-mocks.ts: @tanstack/solid-query, @solidjs/router, @opencode-ai/core/util/encode, @opencode-ai/core/util/path, @kobalte/core/popover, fuzzysort. These are used by 8 of 22 dialogs and currently unmocked.
conditions_for_approval.evidence_required: mockAllContexts() or equivalent calls these mock.module() statements; existing harness tests still pass
mock.module() calls for all 5; existing harness tests pass

conditions_for_approval.requirement: Reclassify DialogEditProject from File 2 (dialog-simple.test.ts) into File 7 (dialog-complex.test.ts). DialogEditProject has 9+ imports spanning server-sdk, server-sync, layout, tanstack query, and @/pages/layout/helpers.
Document the Bun 1.3.14 mock.module() per-process limitation in test setup comments. Tests must be run with `bun test --isolate` or one file at a time until Bun ships PR #31319's per-file sweep.
conditions_for_approval.evidence_required: Comment at top of happydom.ts or test-utils/dialog-harness.ts documenting the constraint

conditions_for_approval.requirement: Run a proof-of-concept for one simple dialog (DialoEditMcp or DialogUsageExceeded) and one dialog with sibling cascade (DialogSelectProvider or DialogManageModels) to validate the complete mock chain before creating all 7 test files.
conditions_for_approval.evidence_required: Two passing test files with bun test --isolate

recommended_implementation_order: 1. Add third-party and @/utils/* mocks to dialog-mocks.ts (conditions 1-2)
2. Run POC: DialogEditMcp (simplest — only useLanguage dep)
3. Run POC: DialogSelectProvider (tests sibling cascade with existing mockAllContexts)
4. Fix any cascade failures found in step 3
5. Create test files 2 (simple), 3 (export/import), 4 (manage) — these have few remaining unmocked deps
6. Create test files 5 (providers), 6 (MCP) — more complex, build on cascade fix from step 3
7. Create test file 7 (complex) — requires all mocks including non-dialog sibling mocks

follow_up_issues.description: The non-dialog sibling components (SettingsGeneral, ServerRow, ModelTooltip, useSessionLayout) are untested and may have their own unmocked imports. These should be audited and added to dialog-mocks.ts or tested separately.
DialogEditProject imports from @/pages/layout/helpers (getProjectAvatarSource) — a cross-boundary page import. Consider injecting as a prop to isolate the dialog from page-layer dependencies.

The @opencode-ai/sdk/v2/client type import in dialog-fork, dialog-select-mcp, dialog-connect-provider may resolve to a real SDK module. Verify whether bun treats type-only imports as resolvable (they typically don't require mocking in Bun, but should be verified with a trial run).
Once Bun releases the per-file mock sweep (PR #31319), update the test runner configuration to remove the --isolate workaround.

applied_subagents.contribution: Confirmed dependency matrix; identified 19 context/hooks/utils modules across 22 dialogs
Confirmed Bun 1.3.14 per-process mock.module(); verified sibling cascade resolves correctly; flagged @tanstack/solid-query gap
